title: Clean as You Code Overview | SonarQube Cloud Documentation
content:
# Implementation

## [Practicing Clean as You Code as a developer](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/digging-deeper/clean-as-you-code/implementation/#practicing-clean-as-you-code-as-a-developer "Practicing Clean as You Code as a developer")

The configuration steps described above and in the following sections are handled by project administrators. As a developer, you practice Clean as You Code by reviewing and fixing the issues detected in new code, ensuring that the quality gate is always green and that only clean code is merged.

![](https://docs.sonarsource.com/Base64-Image-Removed)

![Overview of the code analysis and merging process.](https://assets-eu-01.kc-usercontent.com:443/b1eeb429-d9e0-0100-be87-468f6802040a/df7af89d-f582-43f1-82bf-1ebbb6c5fe79/Sonar_Q1001%20-%20Page%201%20%2842%29.png?w=4992&h=1206&auto=format&fit=crop "Overview of the code analysis and merging process.")

To learn more about these topics, refer to the Issues, Quality gates, and Clean Code sections (see links below).

## [Related pages](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/digging-deeper/clean-as-you-code/implementation/#related-pages "Related pages")

- [Setting up Clean as You Code](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/managing-your-projects/project-analysis/clean-as-you-code/ "Setting up Clean as You Code")
- [Managing your code issues](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/managing-your-projects/issues/introduction/ "Managing your code issues")
- [Quality gates](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/improving/quality-gates/ "Quality gates")
- [Clean Code](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/digging-deeper/clean-code/introduction/ "Clean Code")
